title: The Indecent Representation of Women (Prohibition) Act, 1986
full_text: The Indecent Representation of Women (Prohibition) Act, 1986 स्‍त्री अशिष्‍ट रूपण (प्रतिषेध) अधिनियम, 1986 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198660 Act Number: 60 Enactment Date: 1986-12-23 Act Year: 1986 Short Title: The Indecent Representation of Women (Prohibition) Act, 1986 Hindi Title: स्‍त्री अशिष्‍ट रूपण (प्रतिषेध) अधिनियम, 1986 Long Title: An Act to prohibit indecent representation of women through advertisements or in publications, writings, paintings, figures or in any other manner and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development Enforcement Date: 02-10-1987 Notification: 2nd October, 1987, vide notification No G.S.R. 821(E), dated 25th September, 1987, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Indecent Representation of Women (Prohibition) Act, 1986 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Prohibition of advertisements containing indecent representation of women. Section 4. Prohibition of publication or sending by post of books, pamphlets, etc., containing indecent representation of women. Section 5. Powers to enter and search. Show Related Subordinates Section 6. Penalty. Section 7. Offences by companies Section 8. Offences to be cognizable and bailable. Section 9. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 10. Power to make rules.
